title: AdaRubric: Task-Adaptive Rubrics for Reliable LLM Agent Evaluation and Reward Learning
acquisition_purpose: Source acquisition for queued review-adarubric-adaptive-trajectory-instrument-validity; this record does not claim a deep review.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v3 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.ownership_evidence: The immutable arXiv v3 summary and paper page 1 directly link github.com/alphadl/AdaRubrics.
official_release.paper_correspondence: The observed official HEAD postdates arXiv v3. Its bundled assets/adarubrics.pdf is byte-identical to the acquired immutable arXiv v3 PDF (SHA-256 4c328caeac7ef6027460da8b9ff4938eb64a156606a8787ca4f3de61fbdeed38). Commit 26b0d94951e480e08a54dd0922a9ce4028e91d26 explicitly says it updated the bundled PDF to accepted v3; later HEAD changes include defaults and CI/docs fixes. Treat HEAD as a pinned post-v3 release, not necessarily the exact code used for paper experiments.
official_release.inspection_status: Archive integrity verified with unzip -t; listing contains 54 files including package code, prompts, filters, tests, examples, README, license, lockfile, and bundled paper. Full methodological audit remains the reviewer task.
